overlay_text_used: YOUR MAT. YOUR PEOPLE. YOUR HOME IN CLARK.

source_asset.asset_dimensions: 1280x960 (landscape — master canvas is 1080x1350 portrait, Canva auto-cropped on placement)

production_steps_executed: drive_search_community_subfolder (4 newest: 2 fresh today, 2 from W19 FRI shoot)
canva_commit_editing_transaction (immediate, succeeded first try with tight timing)
production_notes: MON master uses a VIDEO fill on the page background, not an image. update_fill DID accept changing asset_type from video to image — confirmed working. The wordmark badge, D'Cobrinha signature, and bottom-left overlay text remained intact across the swap. This is an important capability finding: registered-master mode supports cross-type asset swaps, not just like-for-like. First call to perform-editing-operations got a transient server error; retry with a fresh transaction succeeded immediately. Bracket the perform+commit pair to avoid TTL.
review_notes: Output looks excellent: team lineup of ~7 students in white gis in front of the gym's wall-mounted Alliance Jiu Jitsu | CLARK wordmark. The design's wordmark badge sits at the top center, the 'YOUR MAT. YOUR PEOPLE. YOUR HOME IN CLARK.' bottom overlay reads cleanly on the floor area in the lower-left. Strong Monday 'set the tone' composition. The team's brand presence reads twice — once via the gym wall in the photo and again via the design's wordmark badge — which reinforces rather than competes.
